assertions.title: RSVP confirmation email uses site palette

steps.action: Inspect rendered RSVP HTML colors and legacy palette values
steps.expected: Uses #f5f3f0 + #1a1816 and contains no legacy palette colors
steps.observed: Rendered RSVP HTML includes #f5f3f0/#1a1816 and legacy color grep returned no matches.

assertions.title: RSVP confirmation includes full party details with null handling

steps.action: Render RSVP email with full event data and null-edge event data
steps.expected: Full render shows title/date/time range/venue/address/price; null render omits address, uses start time only, and shows Free for price=0
steps.observed: render-check-summary.json confirms all fullDetails=true and nullHandling=true including timeCell="8:00 PM" when time_end=null.

assertions.title: Day-of reminder email uses site palette

steps.action: Inspect rendered day-of HTML colors and legacy palette values
steps.expected: Uses #f5f3f0 + #1a1816 and contains no legacy palette colors
steps.observed: Rendered day-of HTML includes #f5f3f0/#1a1816 and old palette grep returned no matches.

assertions.title: Day-of reminder includes full party details with null handling

steps.action: Render day-of email with full and null-edge event data
steps.expected: Full render includes time range/address/price; null render omits address and uses start time only with Free when price=0
steps.observed: render-check-summary.json dayOf.fullDetails and dayOf.nullHandling are all true.

commands.outputExcerpt: No Address row in null renders (expected).

assertions.title: Both emails include Stop One wordmark

steps.action: Check rendered HTML for wordmark image references
steps.expected: Both templates include with stop1 wordmark asset

commands.outputExcerpt: rsvp-full.html and day-of-full.html both match wordmark.png.

assertions.title: Email time formatting uses correct timezone

steps.action: Inspect constant definition/import and timeZone usage in both email templates
steps.expected: EVENT_TIMEZONE is defined as America/New_York and used in date/time formatting options
steps.observed: EVENT_TIMEZONE constant exists in src/lib/constants.ts and both templates import and use timeZone: EVENT_TIMEZONE for date/start/end formatting.

commands.outputExcerpt: Both templates show timeZone: EVENT_TIMEZONE at date/start/end formatting lines.

assertions.title: RSVP API route fetches all required event fields

steps.action: Inspect RSVP API event select() fields
steps.observed: src/pages/api/rsvp/[slug].ts select includes 'id, status, title, date, time_end, door_price, venue_name, venue_address'.

commands.outputExcerpt: src/pages/api/rsvp/[slug].ts:26 .select('id, status, title, date, time_end, door_price, venue_name, venue_address')

assertions.title: Email function signatures accept full event data

steps.action: Inspect both template event parameter types
steps.expected: Both signatures include time_end, door_price, venue_address types
steps.observed: Both templates define time_end: string | null, door_price: number, venue_address: string | null in event parameter type.

commands.command: rg -n "time_end: string \| null|door_price: number|venue_address: string \| null" src/lib/emails/rsvp-confirmation.ts src/lib/emails/day-of-reminder.ts
commands.outputExcerpt: All three fields present in both files.

assertions.title: Day-of reminder send route fetches required fields

steps.action: Inspect reminder send-email route event select() fields
steps.expected: select includes time_end and door_price (plus other required fields)
steps.observed: send-email.ts select includes 'id, title, date, time_end, door_price, venue_name, venue_address, reminder_email_sent_at'.

assertions.title: Plain text email bodies include key party details

steps.action: Inspect text fields in source and rendered text outputs for full/null cases
steps.expected: Text bodies include date/time/venue/address/price for full data and omit null fields
steps.observed: Source includes Date/Time/Venue/Address/Price lines; rendered null outputs omit Address and keep Price: Free with start-only time.

commands.outputExcerpt: Both templates include Date/Time/Venue and conditional Address plus Price lines.
No Address line in null text renders (expected).
Both null text renders include Price: Free.
No ranged time in null text renders (expected).

assertions.title: Production build passes with all changes

steps.expected: pnpm build exits 0 with no TypeScript build failure
steps.observed: pnpm build completed successfully with EXIT_CODE:0 and Astro build complete.

commands.outputExcerpt: Deploy config validated; astro build complete; Server built in 3.37s.
